rulings.Case Title: ALZ LEE, LLC et al VS. SHACUAN SHARON LEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 28, 2015, Line 1. DEFENDANT SHARON LEE SETO AND FAMILY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant Sharon Seto and Family's Demurrer to the Complaint is OVERRULED. The case was sent out for trial on April 20, 2015. Defendant Sharon Seto & Family stipulated to the Doe amendment in question, and the complaint as amended states a valid claim. Defendant cannot claim the complaint is defective because it does not specify the nature of the claim she herself is asserting in this litigation as a claimant with an interest in the property. (See Stroizer v. Williams (1960) 187 Cal.App.2d 528, 532.) Defendant is ordered to answer the complaint by 4:00PM on Wednesday, April 29, 2015. The Court finds this time limit to file an answer just under Code of Civil Procedure section 472a, in light of the case already being sent out to trial, and the issue having been raised in front of the Referee in some detail. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order at the hearing. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARTHUR ANDERSON VS. LOIS STOCKS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 28, 2015, Line 8. DEFENDANT LOIS STOCKS MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Lois Stocks' Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint is DENIED for improper service per CCP § 1015. Motion was not served on Plaintiff's counsel of record. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RENKA PROP. LLC VS. SYLVIA SMITH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 28, 2015, Line 9. DEFENDANT SYLVIA SMITH's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike Complaint is DENIED. Motion to Strike pursuant to CCP 435-437 is not proper means for striking portions of exhibits attached to the pleading. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHANEEDA JAFFER VS. DESIREE ELIOTT CHACHETTE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Atty Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 28, 2015, Line 10. PLAINTIFF SHANEEDA JAFFER'S Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs. Plaintiff's Motion for Attorneys' Fees is GRANTED subject to opposition. Plaintiff is the prevailing party and is awarded $11,301 in reasonable attorneys' fees and $1,269.08 in costs. (See Code Civ. Pro., § 1033.5(a)(10); Civ. Code, § 1717.). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JACK HALPRIN VS. REBECCA BAUKNIGHT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Vacate Default Qand Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 28, 2015, Line 11. DEFENDANT REBECCA BAUKNIGHT's Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment. Defendant's Motion to Vacate Default and Judgment is DENIED. Defendant failed to show that her lack of action was a result of mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect. (Code Civ. Pro., § 473(b).) =(501/REQ)
